# brevo_contact_attribute (Resource)

Manages a contact attribute in Brevo. Use this to declare custom contact fields like `FIRMA`, `FIRSTNAME`, etc. Brevo's REST API treats `name` and `category` as the identifier; changing either forces replacement.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `category` (String) Category of the attribute: `normal`, `transactional`, `category`, `calculated`, or `global`.
- `name` (String) Name of the attribute (uppercase recommended, e.g. `FIRMA`).

### Optional

- `type` (String) Type of the attribute. Allowed values depend on category. For `normal`: `text`, `date`, `float`, `boolean`, `multiple-choice`. For `transactional`: `id`. For `category`: `category`.
- `value` (String) Value or formula for the attribute. Only used when category is `calculated` or `global`.

### Read-Only

- `calculated_value` (String) Calculated value formula as reported by the API.
- `id` (String) Composite identifier in the form `category/name`.
